articles.title: Xbox CEO Considers Removing Competitor Logos
articles.description: Xbox CEO acknowledges the need to adjust future showcases by potentially removing PS5 and Switch logos. This reflects a shift in marketing strategy.
articles.impact: This could redefine Xbox's marketing approach.

articles.title: Google Drive Unveils Enhanced Document Scanner
articles.description: Google Drive is launching a redesigned document scanner for high-end Android devices, featuring advanced on-device capabilities. This upgrade enhances user experience significantly.
articles.impact: This enhances document scanning efficiency on Android.

articles.title: Windows 11 Introduces Modular Start Menu Update
articles.description: Windows 11's latest build features a modular, resizable Start menu, allowing users to customize which elements to display. This update enhances user personalization.
articles.impact: This improves user control over the Start menu.
